query: Run an EKS operational review on `payment-prod` — I want a full audit across all 10 sections with prioritized actions.
Audit my cluster's operational posture and produce a maturity score.
EKS health check on staging-cluster, please. Walk through the standard sections and rate everything GREEN/AMBER/RED.
Review my EKS posture — operational excellence, the whole thing — and write me a report I can share with leadership.
Check my EKS networking — subnet IPs, CoreDNS, NetworkPolicies. Score it the way an operational review would.
Review RBAC and IAM on my cluster — IRSA, Pod Identity, RBAC bindings, API server endpoint exposure.
Audit observability on my cluster — control plane logs, metrics stack, alerting coverage.
Do an operational assessment on `data-platform` and tell me what's RED.
Is my cluster ready to upgrade from 1.31 to 1.32? Run a readiness assessment and give me a score.
Score my upgrade readiness for EKS — I need to know what's blocking us before we touch the control plane.
What version of EKS am I running and which add-ons do we have installed? Just inherited the cluster and need a discovery pass.
Do a full reconnaissance on our EKS environment — compute strategy, IaC tooling, CI/CD, observability stack — so we know what we're working with.
Should we use Karpenter or Managed Node Groups for our new EKS cluster? Need an architectural recommendation.
How do I install and configure the EKS MCP server so my AI assistant can actually query the cluster?
Walk me through actually upgrading my EKS cluster from 1.30 to 1.31 — give me the full step-by-step procedure.
Audit my AWS account's overall security posture — IAM policies, S3 bucket settings, CloudTrail coverage.
Analyze my EKS cluster's cost efficiency — show me dollar waste per dimension and a cost score.
How much am I wasting on my EKS cluster? Run a cost intelligence assessment with savings projections.
How do we measure whether our internal developer platform is healthy, and what DORA metrics should the platform team track?
Generate a production-ready Terraform project for a new EKS cluster with Karpenter, VPC CNI, and ArgoCD bootstrap
Create architecture decision records and Mermaid topology diagrams for our planned EKS cluster migration
Assess how hard it is to migrate our nginx ingress to ALB and score the effort.
Prepare our EKS cluster for a HIPAA compliance audit — what controls and evidence (Audit Manager, control-plane logs) do we need?
